notes: All 15 responses are coherent and largely accurate; no fabrications (per strict rules, the disabled-button claims, path misreads like 'frederic/local' missing dot, 'vAI', and 'LLaMA.cpp' are key_misses, not hallucinations). Recurring weaknesses: only ~4 reps mention the extra top-right icons, none report the ⌘N/⌘P/⌘K shortcuts, several misread enabled buttons as disabled, and path capture is inconsistent. t0.7|rep0 is clearly strongest; t0.7|rep2 is the weakest (truncated provider list, misspelling).
